title: Drones Flown Over North Korea Were Part of Martial Law Plot by Former South Korean President
summary_full: A court ruled that Yoon Suk Yeol, the impeached former president, had sought to stir up instability to justify his bid for authoritarian rule in 2024.
summary_public: A court ruled that Yoon Suk Yeol, the impeached former president, had sought to stir up instability to justify his bid for authoritarian rule in 2024.
